idea-plugin.name: Mouse Gestures
idea-plugin.description:
Mouse Gestures for IntelliJ IDEA

Execute IDE actions by drawing mouse gestures. Hold the right mouse button, drag to draw a shape, then release — the assigned action fires instantly.

Features

  • Fully customizable gesture-to-action mappings
  • 40+ built-in actions: navigate, edit, build, debug, and more
  • Live gesture trail with direction arrows drawn directly in the IDE
  • Real-time match preview — see which action will fire before releasing
  • Color and thickness customization for the gesture trail
  • Gesture recording mode with duplicate-pattern detection
  • Per-gesture enable/disable toggle
  • Short right-click still shows the context menu — no conflicts

Default gestures

  • ← Left — Navigate Backward
  • → Right — Navigate Forward
  • ↓ Down — Comment / Uncomment Line
  • ↓↘ Down-Right — Close Tab

Open Settings → Tools → Mouse Gestures to add your own.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Gesture recording with live trail overlay
  • 40+ curated IntelliJ actions
  • Correct Undo/Redo/Back/Forward via direct IDE APIs
  • Visualization settings (trail color, thickness, direction arrows)
